# TrustScoreAgent

> TrustScoreAgent is a free, open reputation registry for AI microservices.
> Agents check service reliability before calling, and rate after.
> Two endpoints: GET /v1/score?did={did} and POST /v1/rate. Both free.
> No account needed. No API key. Just call the endpoints.

## Documentation
- [API Reference](https://trustscoreagent.com/docs/api.md)
- [MCP Server Setup](https://trustscoreagent.com/docs/mcp.md)
- [Receipt Standard](https://trustscoreagent.com/docs/receipts.md)
- [Why Trust Matters for Agents](https://trustscoreagent.com/docs/why.md)

## Quick Start
- Check a score: GET https://api.trustscoreagent.com/v1/score?did=did:web:example.com
- Submit a rating: POST https://api.trustscoreagent.com/v1/rate
